title: Update Cargo.toml and integration points for no_std RNG in EDHOC
description: Adjust rand_core dep and features. Check lichen-link, lichen-node for RNG passing.
close_reason: Cargo.toml updated: removed getrandom from rand_core dep, added std = ["rand_core?/getrandom"], added dev-dep rand_core with getrandom for tests. No changes needed in lichen-link/rpl/node yet.
